########################################################################################
# (1): Auriga halo number
# (2): Resolution level (4 is lowest, 2 is highest)
# (3): System ID (matches PeakMassIndex in Auriga public data release)
# (4): Morphology classification
# (5): Stellar mass recorded as log10(M / M_sun)
# (6): Number of star particles
# (7): Fraction of stellar mass bound to the progenitor at z=0
# (8): Pericentre [kpc]
# (9): Apocentre [kpc]
# (10): Accretion time [Gyr]
# (11): Distance from the main host at z=0 for objects with a bound progenitor [kpc]
# (12): Flag whether a system experienced preprocessing
# (13): System ID for match one resolution level higher (-999 for no match)
# (14): Flag for quality assessment of that match
########################################################################################
